message:
feat(web): use native runtime for async handler execution and export handler types

Replaces futures_lite::future::block_on with a proper runtime-backed
async handler executor. Introduces run_async_handler() which lazily
initializes a single-threaded Runtime via OnceLock and uses block_on
to drive async Cx-aware handler futures. Falls back to 500 Internal
Server Error if runtime construction fails.

Also exports AsyncCxFnHandler{,1,2,3,4} from src/web/mod.rs so
downstream code can reference the handler wrapper types directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
